title: Refund escalation policy
content: Refunds above 250 dollars require approval. Support should gather ticket context and customer history before drafting the request.

title: Incident communication checklist
content: During a payment outage, update the incident record, notify support leads, and post customer-safe status messaging.

title: Tenant 2 support handbook
content: Tenant 2 has separate escalation rules and should not appear in tenant 1 results.
